blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,553 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 20" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
